headline: How The Investment Narrative For Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Is Shifting After Target Resets
summary: Builders FirstSource’s updated fair value estimate has been trimmed from US$126.24 to US$120.62, a reset of around 4.4% that reshapes the reference point for potential upside and downside. This shift lines up with recent Street commentary, where some firms are cutting price targets while others still see support from margins and the housing cycle. As you read on, you will see how these moving targets and opinions fit together and what to watch as the story develops. Analyst Price Targets...
